data.title: Ardmore Shipping Files 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda on March 6, 2026, Ardmore Shipping Corporation (NYSE: ASC) revealed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the period concluding on December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: Eversource Statement on Proposed Final Decision to Approve Aquarion Sale
data.description: In Hartford, Connecticut and Boston, a recent proposal by the Connecticut Public Utilities Regulatory Authority (PURA) has approved the sale of Aquarion Water Company to the South Central Connecticut Regional Water Authority. Eversource Energy (NYSE: ES) responded to this proposed final decision, expressing optimism. The statement was issued by Eversource Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Treasurer John Moreira. This development marks a positive progress in the Aquarion case.

data.title: Inovalis Real Estate Investment Trust Provides Update on Arcueil Withholding Tax Matter and Appeal
data.description: Inovalis Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) disclosed today that the Paris Administrative Court has made a decision concerning withholding tax reassessments tied to the Arcueil property for tax years 2017 to 2019. During this period, the REIT owned a 25% stake in the property via a joint venture. The Court affirmed a tax obligation totaling around €5.888 million ($9.294 million), encompassing the principal amount, penalties, and interest.

data.title: Oracle, OpenAI Reportedly Scrap Plan To Expand AI Data Center
data.description: The stock of Oracle experienced a decline after reports surfaced that the company has halted discussions with OpenAI regarding the expansion of a significant AI data center. This decision to scrap the plan has impacted Oracle's stock performance negatively. The exact numbers related to the stock movement were not provided in the given information.

data.title: Lockheed Martin, RTX Land F-35 Contracts, U.S. To Quadruple Some Defense Production
data.description: Lockheed Martin and RTX were recently awarded several contracts by the Department of Defense to support the F-35 fighter fleet. This move is expected to significantly boost defense production in the United States, with estimates predicting a quadruple increase in output.

data.title: Tango Therapeutics Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In Boston on March 6, 2026, Tango Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TNGX) revealed that as of February 2, 2026, the Compensation Committee of Tango Therapeutics' Board of Directors awarded a non-qualified stock option for 367,500 shares of its common stock and 60,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) to a newly hired individual under Tango Therapeutics' 2023 Inducement Plan.

data.title: THE ASHLEY GIBSON BARNETT MUSEUM OF ART ANNOUNCES 54TH MAYFAIRE BY-THE-LAKE FEATURED ARTIST AND POSTER IMAGE
data.description: In Lakeland, Florida, on March 6, 2026, the Ashley Gibson Barnett Museum of Art at Florida Southern College has named Kate Carney as the Featured Poster Artist for the 54th annual Mayfaire by-the-Lake event. This beloved Mother's Day Weekend tradition is set to take place, featuring a showcase of artwork and crafts. Mayfaire by-the-Lake attracts a large crowd each year, with an estimated number of attendees exceeding thousands. The event serves as a prominent cultural highlight in the region, celebrating art and creativity.

data.title: AdvisorShares Announces NAV Restatement for the AdvisorShares MSOS Daily Leveraged ETF (MSOX)
data.description: AdvisorShares from Bethesda, Maryland declared a correction in the income accrual accounting for total return swaps related to their AdvisorShares MSOS Daily Leveraged ETF (NYSE Arca: MSOX) on March 6, 2026. The net asset value (NAV) per share was adjusted, following the correction.

data.title: Canfor Pulp announces Special Meeting results
data.description: Vancouver, BC - Canfor Pulp Products Inc. (TSX: CFX) has announced the successful approval of the arrangement at a special meeting of shareholders. The resolution authorizing the acquisition of all remaining common shares by Canfor Corporation was voted in favor by the shareholders. The arrangement involves Canfor Corporation purchasing all outstanding Common Shares that it and its affiliates do not already possess through a statutory plan of arrangement.

data.title: Power Metallic - OTC Markets Request
data.description: In Toronto on March 6, 2026, Power Metallic Mines Inc. (referred to as "Power Metallic") (TSX-V: PNPN) (OTCBB: PNPNF) (Frankfurt: IVV) announced its recent collaborations with Native Ads, Inc., Apaton Finance GmbH, and Sideways Frequency LLC within the last year. These partnerships were established to assist in attracting investors to the company.

data.title: Trump Says Defense Primes Agree To Quadruple Output of 'Exquisite Class' Weaponry
data.description: President Donald Trump disclosed on Friday that he has successfully secured commitments from leading U.S. defense contractors to increase the production of 'Exquisite Class' Weaponry by four times its current capacity. This initiative includes an accelerated expansion of production plants, which commenced three months prior. LMT shares are currently trading close to their 52-week highs. Trump revealed this development amidst the ongoing utilization of a vast arsenal of munitions in Iran and most recently in Venezuela. In a post on Truth Social, the former President shared details of a productive meeting with major U.S. defense manufacturing companies, highlighting their agreement to ramp up the production of 'Exquisite Class' Weaponry to achieve maximum output at an expedited pace. For additional information, the entire article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
Recent updates on John Boozman's stock trades reveal investments in 8 companies including NTAP, KR, MSFT, EMB, and CMBS.
STARLIGHT WESTERN CANADA MULTI-FAMILY (NO. 2) FUND ANNOUNCES Q4-2025 OPERATING RESULTS INCLUDING YEAR-OVER-YEAR RENT GROWTH OF 2.9%

data.title: Kalshi faces lawsuit for not paying out prediction market after Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's death, involving many users.
data.description: Kalshi is currently embroiled in a class-action lawsuit due to its management of a market associated with Iranian leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. The lawsuit involves a significant number of plaintiffs who are seeking legal recourse against Kalshi for its actions related to the market involving Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. The case is centered around allegations of mishandling the market by Kalshi, which has led to legal action being taken against the company.

data.title: Notice of Security Incident
data.description: On March 6, 2026, Health Management Systems of America (HMSA) reported a security breach involving unauthorized access to a sole email account. This incident prompted HMSA to take immediate action to address the issue and enhance security measures to prevent future breaches. The exact number of individuals affected by this breach was not disclosed.

data.title: Nerdy Announces Receipt of Notice From NYSE
data.description: Nerdy Inc. (NYSE: NRDY) disclosed today that it has been notified by the New York Stock Exchange ("NYSE") on March 5, 2026, due to non-compliance with the continued listing criteria set under Section 802.01C of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. This was triggered as the average closing price of the Company's Class A Common Stock remained below $1.00 for a continuous 30 trading-day period. The Company promptly informed the NYSE on March 6, 2026 of its intention to rectify the stock price deficiency.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Loses 450 Points As Oil Prices Surge; Palantir Rises, Nvidia Falls (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the stock market experienced a significant decline with the Dow Jones index dropping by 450 points due to a rapid increase in oil prices. Nvidia, a major player in the Dow Jones, suffered notable losses. This downward trend was highlighted in live coverage, with Palantir seeing gains while Nvidia faced a fall in value.

data.title: Arcos Dorados to Host Its 2026 Annual General Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description: Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc., the largest restaurant chain in Latin America and the world's biggest independent McDonald's franchisee, revealed that its Board of Directors has scheduled the Annual Shareholders’ Meeting (“AGM”) for April 10, 2026. The meeting will take place in Montevideo, Uruguay, at 2:00 p.m. (local time), and is open to all shareholders recorded as of March 16, 2026. Arcos Dorados trades on the NYSE under the ticker ARCO.

data.title: Magellan Aerospace Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Magellan Aerospace Corporation (TSX: MAL) based in Toronto has disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 per share on its common shares. The Board of Directors is consistently evaluating dividends quarterly to provide more insight into the recover and to guarantee that the dividend declared strikes a balance between returning capital to shareholders and preserving financial flexibility.

data.title: INLIF LIMITED Reports Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In a press release from Quanzhou, China on March 6, 2026, INLIF LIMITED (Nasdaq: INLF), a leading company specializing in injection molding machine-dedicated manipulator arms, disclosed its fiscal year financial outcomes. The report details the Company's activities in research, development, manufacturing, and sales.
